Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX finishes higher as retailers advance; Sigma slumps on Boots talks
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket rose today as investors shrugged off the latest escalation in the Middle East and another tech sell-off on Wall Street.

news.title: What is Fluorspar and why is it flying?
news.snippet: What is Fluorspar? And why has it shot from obscurity to the latest high-flying critical mineral as China’s supply squeeze sends prices soaring, creating fresh opportunities for ASX developers?

news.title: Why Kmart is opening up a furniture showroom and taking on IKEA
news.snippet: The retail giant behind Kmart is pushing further into the furniture market with its first physical trial store, as it eyes a lucrative market.

news.title: Moonlight drill results build Qld gold system scale
news.snippet: Drilling at Moonlight Resources’ Clermont project in Qld has intersected 20m at 1g/t gold, extending its Leo Grande Central system towards the Leo Grande South target.

news.title: Inflation is hair-raising for the beauty industry
news.snippet: Call it the coiffure index: As consumers feel the cost-of-living crunch, they’re indulging in an affordable treat. Salon-grade hair treatments used at home are emerging as a key part of the trend.

news.title: Viking nails 76% tungsten recoveries in Nevada
news.snippet: Viking Mines has hit a 76% tungsten recovery at its historic Linka project in Nevada, with the result stemming from simple processing ahead of maiden drilling.

news.title: Up to 200 staff to go as Seven’s owner swings the axe
news.snippet: Seven Network staff are bracing for mass job cuts, which are expected to amount to as many as 200 redundancies across the company.

news.title: Critical hits multiple pegmatites in Canadian lithium blitz
news.snippet: Critical Resources has uncovered a swarm of pegmatites, six of them new, at its Mavis Lake lithium project in Canada, expanding the footprint ahead of drilling.

news.title: Kyrgios wins Stuttgart opener after five-month tour absence
Serena Williams makes winning return to court at Queen's
Aussies record first ODI loss to Bangladesh in 21 years
